section_name: Memorial Designation of Highway by Local Government
text:
(a) A local government may assign a memorial or other identifying designation to a part of the highway system.

(b) A part of the highway system assigned a designation under Subsection (a) may be marked only with the regular highway number.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.002 — Memorial Designation of Highway by Local Government

(a) A local government may assign a memorial or other identifying designation to a part of the highway system.

(b) A part of the highway system assigned a designation under Subsection (a) may be marked only with the regular highway number.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A local government may assign a memorial or other identifying designation to a part of the highway system.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A part of the highway system assigned a designation under Subsection (a) may be marked only with the regular highway number.
